generated_purpose: Isolate remaining Rust-owned CLI/system surfaces into explicit self-host replacement tranches without overstating zero-Rust closure.

selfhost_progress: selfhost-first runtime path for supported run/test programs
surfaces.next_slice: Lift manifest resolution, package loading policy, and cache orchestration out of Rust command handlers.
Define an Enkai-owned manifest/report runner for readiness contracts and validation suites before replacing CLI wrappers.
Peel off request/response configuration and service manifest loading before replacing HTTP/WS/gRPC transport implementations.
Isolate worker job manifest parsing, retry policy, and queue contract handling into Enkai-owned code before transport/runtime migration.
Separate registry metadata/state transitions and training config loading from Rust command orchestration before backend replacement.
Extract deployment plan/config evaluation into Enkai-owned manifests before replacing Rust automation shells.
